name: Arjun Mehta
headline: AI Engineer | NLP | Generative AI | FastAPI Developer
summary: AI Engineer specializing in Machine Learning, NLP, and Generative AI systems. Experienced in building production-style AI applications using Python, FastAPI, LangChain, and transformer-based models.

projects.title: AI Customer Support Agent

Built hybrid verification pipeline combining transformer models with LLM reasoning.
Achieved 90% classification accuracy on validation dataset.

experience: AI Engineering Intern at TechNova Solutions (Jan 2026 - Present)
